Setlist
Mom It's My Birthday
This is a list of shows where a member of DMB performed on their birthday.

Peter Griesar (3/19/69) and Rashawn Ross (1/16/79) have not played any shows on their birthdays.
Date Member Age Location WWYS? Notes
